scripts.english: Please choose your flavor before we cook this order.
scripts.staffNote: Do not cook until customer chooses.

scripts.english: Please send your phone number so staff can confirm your order.
Please send your delivery address or choose pickup.
Some prices need staff confirmation. We will confirm your final total before cooking.
scripts.staffNote: Escalate to owner/current menu before final total.

scripts.english: Sorry, that item is unavailable today. We can help you choose the closest replacement.
scripts.staffNote: Do not say permanently removed unless owner confirms.

scripts.english: Please upload your payment proof photo before we start cooking.
Direct order is faster for repeat orders and clearer for custom flavors. Staff confirms with you here in Telegram.
Just confirming: you selected a very hot heat level. We will prepare it as ordered.
scripts.staffNote: Use for high-heat selections or uncertain customers.
